basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tezpur University has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for Project Assistant Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Tezpur University office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Project Assistant: Maximum age limit is 50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: 3 years Diploma / B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) or Information Technology. B.Tech/M.Tech degrees in CSE, IT, Information Security/Cyber Security, Data Science, or MCA are eligible.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: 3 years Diploma / B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) or Information Technology. Preference I: B.Tech/M.Tech degrees in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), Information Security/Cyber Security, Data Science, or Master of Computer Applications (MCA) are eligible to apply. Applicants should have specialization in or demonstrated experience in Bioinformatics, Computer Networking, Cloud Computing, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML), or Big Data Analytics. Preference II: Preference will be given to candidates having hands-on experience in programming, computer networking, cloud computing, cyber security, data analysis, computational biology tools, AI/ML frameworks, or large-scale data handling relevant to the project.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant: ₹27,000.00 (Rupees twenty seven thousand) only per month + HRA as admissible

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Tezpur University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Tezpur University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Tezpur University?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on 01 July 2026. There is no separate last date for application submission before the interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a 3-year Diploma or B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) or Information Technology. B.Tech/M.Tech degrees in relevant fields or MCA are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of ₹27,000.00 per month, plus admissible House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Assistant vacancy at Tezpur University?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must appear for a walk-in interview on 01 July 2026 at Tezpur University with all required original documents and photocopies.

faq.question: Q6. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry all original and self-attested photocopies of mark sheets, certificates from 10th standard onwards, caste certificate (if applicable), experience certificate (if applicable), and any other testimonials.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Tezpur University, Tezpur, Assam, 784028.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific preferences for candidates applying for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with specialization or experience in Bioinformatics, Computer Networking, Cloud Computing, Cyber Security, AI/ML, or Big Data Analytics, and those with hands-on experience in relevant programming and data handling skills.
